title: gymnogramma sulphurea
intro: Gymnogramma sulphurea, also known as the Golden Rattlesnake fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dennstaedtiaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's extracts have been found to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects, making it beneficial for overall health and well-being. Gymnogramma sulphurea is commonly prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
